Headers.Name: Authorization
Headers.Description: Authentication information, refer to API authentication

Body.Name: voice_name
Body.Notes:
The maximum length of text content is 20 characters


The voices that are no longer used after creation can be deleted through the API

Body.Name: voice_url
Body.Description: The URL of voice data file
Body.Notes:
Supports .mp3 / .wav audio file and .mp4 / .mov video file


The voice needs to be clean and free of noise, with only one type of human voice present, with a duration of no less than 5 seconds and no longer than 30 seconds

Body.Name: video_id
Body.Description: Generated video ID, which can provide audio materials by referencing historical works
Body.Notes:
Only videos that meet the following conditions can be used to customize voice: The video is generated on V2.6 model and the value of sound parameter is on
The video is generated through Avatar API
The video is generated through Lip-Sync API



The voice needs to be clean and free of noise, with only one type of human voice present, with a duration of no less than 5 seconds and no longer than 30 seconds

Body.Name: callback_url
Body.Description: The callback notification address for the result of this task. If configured, the server will actively notify when the task status changes.
Body.Notes: For specific message schema, see Callback Protocol

Body.Name: external_task_id
Body.Notes:
Will not overwrite system-generated task ID, but supports querying task by this ID


Please note that the customized task ID must be unique within a single user account.

Comments.code: // Error Codes；Specific definitions can be found in Error codes
Comments.data.created_at: // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit ms
Comments.data.task_id: // Task ID, generated by the system
Comments.data.updated_at: // Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit ms
Comments.request_id: // Request ID, generated by the system, is used to track requests and troubleshoot problems

PathParams.Name: task_id
PathParams.Description: The task ID of the element creation task. Request path parameter, directly fill the value in the request path.

PathParams.Name: external_task_id
PathParams.Description: Customized Task ID for audio generation
PathParams.Notes:
The external_task_id filled in when creating the task. You can choose to query by external_task_id or task_id
When creating a task, you can choose to query by external_task_id or task_id.

Headers.Name: Authorization
Headers.Description: Authentication information, refer to API authentication

Comments.code: // Error codes；Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"
Comments.data.created_at: // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms
Comments.data.task_id: // Task ID, generated by the system
Comments.data.task_result.voices.owned_by: // Voice source, kling is the official voice library, and others are the creator's ID
Comments.data.task_status_msg: // Task status information, displaying the failure reason when the task fails (such as triggering the content risk control of the platform, etc.)
Comments.data.updated_at: // Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms
Comments.request_id: // Request ID, generated by the system, is used to track requests and troubleshoot problems
